creator: mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org
text:
On Thu, Nov 15, 2001 at 09:08:13AM -0800, Bruce A. Mah wrote:
> If memory serves me right, mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org wrote:
> 
> > +           <para>This is discussed continually on the FreeBSD mailing
> > +             lists.  Since hardware changes so quickly, however, we
> > +             expect this.  We <emphasis>still</emphasis> strongly
> > +             recommend that you search the mailing list
> > +             <ulink URL="http://www.freebsd.org/search/#mailinglists">
> > +             archives</ulink> before asking about the latest and
> > +             greatest hardware.  Chances are a discussion about the
> > +             type of hardware you're looking for took place just last
> > +             week.</para>
> 
> Hardware list in the release documentation?

I was kind of hoping docs/30202 would be committed or rejected, which
would make this easier to be more correct.

-- 
Michael Lucas
mwlucas@blackhelicopters.org
http://www.blackhelicopters.org/~mwlucas/
